DISCOVERY 610, PETITIONER ZE WEI CHEN'S MOTION FOR ORDER COMPELLING ANSWERS TO INTERROGATORIES AND FOR MONETARY SANCTION - BEIBEI SONG, MANDARIN INTERPRETER SWORN. RESPONDENT PRESENT. COUNSEL FOR PETITIONER PRESENT. MATTER ARGUED. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED WITH SOME MODIFICATIONS. PETITIONER'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO FORM INTERROGATORIES IS GRANTED. RESPONDENT IS ORDERED TO PROVIDE VERIFIED RESPONSES WITHOUT OBJECTION WITHIN 21 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. FAILURE TO RESPOND WAS AN ABUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS. COSTS ARE AWARDED IN THE AMOUNT OF $36.30, TO BE PAID WITHIN 21 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. THE COURT IS UNABLE TO DETERMINE THE AMOUNT OF MONETARY SANCTIONS TO BE AWARDED UNLESS COUNSEL FOR PETITIONER SUBMITS A SUPPLEMENTAL DECLARATION THAT COMPLIES WITH C.C.P. 2023(C) BY SETTING FORTH FACTS SUPPORTING THE AMOUNT OF MONETARY SANCTIONS SOUGHT.
